subtitle: Cagliari's 8-kilometer city beach, under the Devil's Saddle headland and beside one of the Mediterranean's great flamingo colonies — its famed powdery white sand buried in 2002 by a botched renourishment that got the city government sued.
spike_statement: Cagliari's 8 km city beach, whose famous powdery white sand was buried in 2002 under darker imported sand in a renourishment so botched the city government was sued.

levers.photo_tone: a long Mediterranean city beach under the limestone hump of the Sella del Diavolo, clear shallow sea, the slightly-too-dark sand of the 2002 renourishment, pink flamingos over the salt pans behind
